name: Crescent Capital BDC Inc. 5.00% Notes due 2026
summary: Crescent Capital BDC Inc. 5.00% Notes due 2026 is a debt instrument issued by Crescent Capital BDC Inc., a business development company. These notes have a fixed interest rate of 5.00% and are due in 2026. Crescent Capital BDC Inc. is focused on lending to middle market companies and is headquartered in Los Angeles, California.
